description: CompositionHalf sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, has yellow and white gingham checks with blue and red accents, tape detailing on the in-seam of the collar, rolled cuffs with jersey panel, patch pockets on the chest with embroidered seal on the left pocket, full length buttoned placket,  tape detailing on the facing placket and curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degree C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this  yellow and white gingham check shirt from highlander. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
